embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

details.note: message was not in cache — only fields in raw_data available

footer.text: 💡 Click buttons below to explore | Use >adminhelp for admin commands

fields.value:
`>help` - Show this menu
`>ping` - Check bot status
`>uptime` - Bot uptime
`>invitecount` - Get total server invites
fields.name: 📌 Quick Commands

footer.text: 💡 Click 📌 Quick Commands to go back

fields.value:
`>vbucks [user]` - Check VBucks balance
`>vbucksredeem` - Redeem VBucks (default 800)
`>vbucksredeem <amount>` - Redeem custom amount (800+ VBucks)
`>vbuckstransfer` - Transfer VBucks between your own wallets
fields.name: 💎 VBucks

fields.value:
At the end of each **full week**, you're ranked on your activity:
• **🌟 Great:** Earn VBucks based on your rank (1st=250, 2nd=150, 3rd=50)
• Get 🌟 **Great** for **3 weeks straight** → **1.5x bonus** next week!
• Away roles are exempt from all penalties & rewards
fields.name: 📊 How You Earn VBucks

fields.value:
Get a ❌ **Bad** rank? You lose **200 VBucks** from your total balance.
• If balance = 0 → Your duty role is **removed** automatically
• Contact staff to regain your role
• You'll be notified via DM when this happens
fields.name: ⚠️ Bad Performance Penalty

fields.value:
`>pointstovbucks [amount]` — Convert Wave Points to VBucks
`>vbuckstopoints [amount]` — Convert VBucks to Wave Points
`>lrptowp [amount]` — Convert Loot Routes to Wave Points
`>wptolrp [amount]` — Convert Wave Points to Loot Routes

• Trades use the live Market Tier rates
• Drains VBucks wallets in order: **main → role → req**
• **1 free use per week** per command (resets Saturday midnight UTC)
• After free use: A transaction fee is deducted and sent to Central Bank reserves
fields.name: 📈 Market Conversions

fields.value:
`>pay <user> <amount>` — Send Wave Points directly to another user
*Note: Subject to the Central Bank P2P tax rate.*
fields.name: 💸 P2P Payments

fields.value:
`>buybond <amount>` — Lock away Wave Points for 14 days at 40% guaranteed return
`>mybonds` — Check the maturity status of your active bonds
fields.name: 🏦 Bank Bonds

fields.value:
`>buylottery <tickets>` — Buy tickets for the weekly Wave Points lottery
*Draw occurs automatically every Sunday midnight UTC*
fields.name: 🎰 Lottery

fields.value: `>bankinterestinfo` — View your current interest rate and daily payout estimate
fields.name: 📈 Interest Info

embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

details.note: message was not in cache — only fields in raw_data available

before.content:
**🗺️ LOOT ROUTE POINTS — 4× EARN RATES**
⚡ Within 12h → 10 pts (was 2.5)
⚡ Within 24h → 8 pts (was 2)
🏃 Within 48h → 4 pts (was 1)
🚶 Within 3 days → 2 pts (was 0.5)
💀 Late penalty is now descending — -4 day 1, -3 day 2, -2 day 3, then -1/day

**(Loot route prizes have gone up as a result)**

💱 CURRENCY EXCHANGE — REBALANCED
Loot Route Points are now stronger vs Wave Points — baseline raised to 1 LRP = 4 WP (was 1.67).

You can't redeem vbuck prizes anymore with loot route points you rather have to convert them to wave points then transfer wave points to vbucks.

With this, it means you can at any level redeem the vbuck prize from as little to 100 vbucks to 10k if you got that many lol etc. 

Any questions about new system please ask me

https://wavedropmaps.github.io/wave-leaderboard/economy.html

after.content:
**🗺️ LOOT ROUTE POINTS — 4× EARN RATES**
⚡ Within 12h → 10 pts (was 2.5)
⚡ Within 24h → 8 pts (was 2)
🏃 Within 48h → 4 pts (was 1)
🚶 Within 3 days → 2 pts (was 0.5)
💀 Late penalty is now descending — -4 day 1, -3 day 2, -2 day 3, then -1/day

**(Loot route prizes have gone up as a result)**

💱 CURRENCY EXCHANGE — REBALANCED
Loot Route Points are now stronger vs Wave Points — baseline raised to 1 LRP = 4 WP (was 1.67).

You can't redeem vbuck prizes anymore with loot route points you rather have to convert them to wave points then transfer wave points to vbucks.

With this, it means you can at any level redeem the vbuck prize from as little to 100 vbucks to 10k if you got that many lol etc. 

Any questions about new system please ask me

https://wavedropmaps.github.io/wave-leaderboard/economy.html
